farm.register_subtitle: Create a new farm to start offering investment opportunities
farm.name: Farm Name *
farm.altitude_detected: Detected: {value} meters above sea level (via Copernicus DEM)
farm.altitude_error: Could not detect automatically, please enter manually
farm.polygon_subtitle: Improves Copernicus Risk Score precision. Without a polygon, GPS coordinates will be used.
farm.polygon_guide_title: How to create your farm boundary?
farm.polygon_guide_step1: Download Google Earth on your phone (free on the App Store and Play Store)
farm.polygon_guide_step2: Open Google Earth and navigate to your farm
farm.polygon_guide_step3: Tap the polygon icon (square with pencil)
farm.polygon_guide_step4: Walk the farm perimeter while tapping points on the map
farm.polygon_guide_step5: Close the polygon by tapping the first point
farm.no_lots_yet: No lots on this farm yet.
farm.no_farms_subtitle: Register your first farm to start offering investment opportunities to partners.
farm.empty_body: Register your first farm to get your free Copernicus satellite analysis and appear in the Open Farms directory.
farm.failed_load: Failed to load your farms. Please refresh and try again.
farm.sign_in_required: Sign in as a farmer to register a farm
farm.score_analyzing_desc: Consulting Sentinel-2 and ERA5 satellites. This may take a few minutes.
farm.score_running_desc: We are processing the polygon, vegetation, climate, and preliminary EUDR evidence.
farm.score_retry_desc: Try running the analysis again. If the issue continues, check that the farm has a polygon or GPS coordinates.
farm.eudr_compliant_msg: This farm complies with the European Union Deforestation Regulation. The coffee can be exported to Europe.
farm.eudr_non_compliant_msg: Possible post-2020 deforestation detected. Contact Harvverse.
farm.eudr_pending_msg: EUDR compliance is pending. The satellite analysis does not have enough data to confirm yet.
farm.eudr_prelim_helper: Based on Copernicus satellite analysis. Final validation required before export.
farm.eudr_grade_summary_excellent: The satellite signal is strong and shows no relevant alerts.
farm.eudr_grade_summary_good: The satellite signal is favorable, with enough evidence to keep moving.
farm.eudr_grade_summary_medium: There are variations or incomplete evidence. Review before export.
farm.eudr_grade_summary_poor: There are high-risk signals or possible deforestation. Attention needed.
farm.eudr_grade_summary_unknown: There is not enough satellite data for a reliable reading.
farm.photos_subtitle: Photos help partners understand your farm.
farm.images_manage_desc: Upload, delete, and order farm photos. The first image is the primary image.
farm.photos_empty_desc: Show the land, coffee plants, and surroundings so the profile feels complete.
farm.invest_cta: Want to co-invest in this farm?

lot.area_auto: auto-calculated from polygon, or enter manually
lot.plan_hint: Pre-filled with standard terms — adjust as needed.
lot.outside_farm_warning: Some lot corners seem to be outside the farm boundary. Please verify the polygon.

lot.polygon_guide_step2: Open Google Earth and navigate to the lot
lot.polygon_guide_step3: Tap the polygon icon (square with pencil)
lot.polygon_guide_step4: Walk the lot perimeter while tapping points on the map
lot.polygon_guide_step5: Close the polygon by tapping the first point
lot.polygon_guide_step7: Upload the KML file or draw the polygon here
lot.altitude_detected: Detected: {value} m above sea level (via Copernicus DEM)
lot.altitude_error: Could not detect automatically, please enter manually
lot.calculate_risk: Calculate Risk Score from Satellite Data
lot.draft_banner: This lot is a draft — not visible to partners
lot.terms_optional_hint: You can define investment terms later. Without terms, the lot will be saved as a draft and won't be visible to partners until you publish.
lot.draft_redirect: You can publish it from your lot management.
lot.sign_in_required: Sign in to create a lot
lot.no_active_plan: No active plan published for this lot.
lot.score_pending_desc: Satellite analysis will be calculated automatically once lot GPS coordinates are registered.
lot.polygon_fallback: Showing farm boundaries (lot has no custom polygon)
lot.farm_polygon_required: Farm polygon or GPS coordinates required
lot.score_source_sentinel: Sentinel-2 NDVI + ERA5 climate (Open-Meteo) · last 24 months
lot.score_source_climate: ERA5 climate (Open-Meteo) · last 24 months · add Sentinel Hub credentials to include NDVI
lot.failed_load: Failed to load lot details. Please refresh.
lot.failed_load_lots: Failed to load lots. Please refresh.
lot.no_available_lots: No lots available at this time.
lot.ndvi_no_data: No Sentinel-2 data — add credentials to enable NDVI scoring
lot.ndvi_measured: Measured: {value} avg NDVI over {months} months (0 = bare soil, 1 = dense vegetation)
lot.ndvi_stability_has_data: Coeff. of variation over {months} readings — low CV = more stable canopy
lot.ndvi_stability_no_data: At least 2 NDVI readings needed to calculate stability
lot.precip_detail: Measured: {mm} mm/year (avg over {years} years · optimal range 1,500–2,000 mm/year)
lot.temp_detail: Measured: {temp} °C avg over {months} months (optimal 18–22°C · 15–18°C for specialty)
lot.eudr_compliant_detail: Compliant — lot free from deforestation per EUDR
lot.eudr_pending_detail: Assessment pending — compliance status not yet verified
lot.section_a_info: Defined at lot creation — immutable once deployed on-chain
lot.section_b_locked: Marketing fields are locked while lot is "{status}"

risk_score.title: Copernicus Risk Score
risk_score.ndvi_avg_desc: Overall health of coffee trees (Sentinel-2, 24 months)
risk_score.ndvi_stability_desc: Consistency of management — fluctuations indicate neglect or pests
risk_score.rain_distrib_desc: Dry season for flowering + rains for cherry development
risk_score.eudr_screening_desc: Satellite-based risk analysis; not automatic legal certification
risk_score.eudr_prelim_helper: Based on Copernicus satellite analysis. Final validation required before export.
risk_score.eudr_grade_summary_excellent: The satellite signal is strong and shows no relevant alerts.
risk_score.eudr_grade_summary_good: The satellite signal is favorable, with enough evidence to keep moving.
risk_score.eudr_grade_summary_medium: There are variations or incomplete evidence. Review before export.
risk_score.eudr_grade_summary_poor: There are high-risk signals or possible deforestation. Attention needed.
risk_score.eudr_grade_summary_unknown: There is not enough satellite data for a reliable reading.
risk_score.no_sentinel: No Sentinel Hub credentials — NDVI scores estimated from climate proxies.

partnership.wallet_help: Need help? Contact support or join our Discord.

polygon.paste_hint: Google Earth can copy the KML contents. Paste it here; we only extract polygon coordinates.
polygon.paste_placeholder: Paste the full KML or GeoJSON text here...
polygon.paste_error: Could not read a valid polygon. Check that you pasted the complete KML or GeoJSON.

landing.hero_subheadline: Register free. Get your EUDR Compliance Score powered by ESA Copernicus satellites. Join the global directory of verified farms.
landing.hero_microcopy: No credit card. No certification required. Takes less than 5 minutes.
landing.how_headline: Three steps to EUDR compliance. Zero cost.
landing.how_step1_desc: Upload your GPS polygon. Walk your perimeter, export KML, upload. Takes 5 minutes.
landing.how_step2_desc: ESA Copernicus satellites verify your farm. EUDR score in seconds. 0–100. Automatic.
landing.how_step3_desc: Your farm appears in the global Open Farms directory. Buyers and investors find you directly.
landing.partners_headline: Invest in verified specialty coffee farms. Earn 40% of harvest profits.
landing.partners_body: Global co-investment in real coffee lots. Satellite-verified farms. Smart contracts on Base L2 distribute profits automatically. No debt. No intermediaries. Just results.
landing.partners_cta: Join the Digital Partner Waiting List
landing.waitlist_headline: Join the waitlist. Be first when Digital Partner access opens in your region.
landing.waitlist_microcopy: We'll notify you when Digital Partner access opens in your region. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.
landing.eudr_urgency_stat: ~50% of Honduran coffee exports go to the EU
landing.eudr_urgency_warn: No GPS traceability = no EU market access
landing.footer_built_on: Built on Base L2 · Satellite data: ESA Copernicus
landing.about_body: Harvverse is the platform where EUDR compliance meets agricultural co-investment. A farmer who registers their farm gets a satellite-verified score, global visibility, and access to capital — without debt, without intermediaries, and without losing their land.
landing.proven_headline: This model worked before blockchain existed. Now it scales globally.
landing.proven_partner: Co-founded with Sasa Sestic — World Barista Champion 2015
landing.proven_bridge: "COVID ended the physical program in 2020. Harvverse makes it permanent."
landing.tech_pillar1_desc: 7 satellite variables verify every farm. Sentinel-2, Sentinel-1 SAR, ERA5 Climate. 0–100 score.
landing.tech_pillar2_desc: Automated 60/40 profit distribution. No intermediary. No manual process. Blockchain-verified.
landing.tech_pillar3_desc: GPS polygon + deforestation check built-in. Every farm. Automatically.
landing.about_cta_headline: This is not a concept. Smart contracts are deployed. Farms are onboarding.

lot_financial.plan_hint: Default values — adjust according to your agreement with the partner.
lot_financial.ticket_helper: How much the partner invests (in dollars)
lot_financial.price_helper: Price at which the coffee will be sold in USD/lb
lot_financial.agro_cost_helper: Farm expenses to produce this harvest (in dollars)
lot_financial.yield_helper: Quintals you expect to harvest in year one
lot_financial.yield_cap_helper: Maximum quintals this lot can produce
lot_financial.farmer_share_helper: Percentage of net profit that belongs to you
lot_financial.preview_note: Based on projected yield and sale price
lot_financial.tooltip_quintal: One quintal (qq) equals 100 pounds of coffee. It is the standard harvest measurement unit in Honduras.
lot_financial.tooltip_price_floor: The floor price is the minimum price at which the coffee will be sold, regardless of the market. It protects the farmer if prices fall.
lot_financial.tooltip_agro_cost: Agronomic cost includes all expenses needed to produce the harvest: fertilizers, labor, pesticides, and transport.
lot_financial.no_plan: No active plan published for this lot.
